mapper.select: SELECT id, payment_code, order_code, total_price, total_fee, payment_purpose, pay_method, status, paid_at, created_datetime FROM tbl_payment WHERE id = #{paymentId}
SELECT id, payment_code, order_code, total_price, total_fee, payment_purpose, pay_method, status, paid_at, created_datetime FROM tbl_payment WHERE payment_code = #{paymentCode}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_payment WHERE buyer_id = #{buyerId}
